E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

CAMAN X98 V2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 744
Recv ID: 764
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 29
Func Name: Climatisation

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "042",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0100"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "042",
    "soft": "0102",
    "version": "0100"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 61443,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "VBatt"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37124,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EvapTemp"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37125,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37171,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CompValve"
  }
]
